title: Spellblades Sans
body:
THIS IS A FABRIC MOD

This mod requires the following:

Architectury

Azurelib

Extra Spell Attributes

Spell Power

Spell Engine

Runes

Player-Animator

It is VERY RECOMMENDED to use the following with this mod:

Better Combat

Adaptive Tooltips

Wizards

This is a stripped down version of Spellblades and Such, on request of people who thought that the original has too much stuff in it and is bloated as a result. 

All it has are the spellblades, the related technique books, rune armor, and orbs.
